title: U.S. and Iran Set to Hold Indirect Talks After Trading Attacks: What to Know
summary_full: Negotiators are in Qatar for indirect talks and ship traffic has risen in the Strait of Hormuz, even as Tehran and Washington remain far apart on key issues. Here’s what to know.
